description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residence surrounded by a lush perimeter of trees and landscaping, creating a private and tranquil environment. The structure features a flat roof and a sprawling, open-plan layout with multiple interconnected sections, including outdoor patios and walkways. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with wooden accents on decks and pathways, and the property includes a spacious green lawn. The landscaping incorporates a mix of flowering and leafy trees, providing both shade and aesthetic appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, open layout, and extensive landscaping, featuring large windows, wooden accents, and a spacious lawn.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above, highlighting the main entrance, central patio, and the dense tree border on three sides.
description_view_1: View 1 emphasizes the expansive lawn area and the rear sections of the house, with the tree line forming a natural enclosure.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the house from the opposite side, showcasing the interconnected sections, outdoor walkways, and the integration of greenery.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side with the largest patio and deck area, as well as the open lawn and the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with adjacent glass panels, accessed via a paved walkway and framed by minimal landscaping.
